tasks.title: 010_indexes.sql — CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY on all FK columns, feed/chat/event query columns, PostGIS GIST on location_point, partial indexes on is_hidden/status/upcoming
011_rls_fixes.sql — Fix profiles_select_any (too open), chat_rooms_insert_authenticated (any user), reports elder visibility, allies write policies, crossover update policy
012_missing_tables.sql — user_blocks, gromada_invites (with expiry trigger), admin_users (role system for Sprint 22)
013_encryption.sql — pgcrypto extension, replace date_of_birth with age_group bucket, encrypt push_token and contact_email with pgp_sym_encrypt, docs/encryption.md
014_audit_log.sql — audit_log table, audit_trigger() function, attach to gromada_members/profiles/gromady/admin_users, 90-day pg_cron retention
015_scalability.sql + docs/database.md — statement_timeout/lock_timeout in Edge Functions, warmth_score materialized view, monthly/weekly counter reset cron, query explain plans, growth projections
Edge Function hardening — admin_users check in all admin endpoints, X-Request-ID passthrough, sliding window rate limiter in api_rate_limits table, push token ownership check in send-notification
